sentences.english: Describe a time when you helped someone.
Explain how it made you feel.
Last winter I volunteered at a local food bank for three weekends in a row.
sentences.korean: 지난 겨울 3주 연속 주말에 지역 푸드 뱅크에서 봉사했어요.

sentences.english: My job was to sort donated food into boxes and hand them out to families in need.
sentences.korean: 기부된 음식을 상자에 분류하고 필요한 가정에 나눠주는 일이었어요.

sentences.english: I'll never forget the look on one elderly woman's face when she received her box.
sentences.korean: 한 할머니가 상자를 받았을 때 얼굴 표정을 절대 잊지 못할 거예요.

sentences.english: She held my hand and said thank you with tears in her eyes.
sentences.korean: 내 손을 잡고 눈에 눈물을 글썽이며 감사하다고 했어요.

sentences.english: That experience taught me that even small acts of kindness can have a profound impact on someone's life.
sentences.korean: 그 경험은 작은 친절도 누군가의 삶에 깊은 영향을 미칠 수 있다는 것을 가르쳐줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Impact of Music on Mood
